# Copilot Commit Message Instructions

All commit messages must follow the Conventional Commits specification.

- Use prefixes such as feat, fix, chore, refactor, docs, test, style, etc.
- Example: feat(auth): add JWT authentication
- Example: fix(routes): correct user route validation
- Keep messages concise and descriptive.
- Do not use generic messages like "update" or "changes".

Reference: https://www.conventionalcommits.org/
